title: Managed Template

posts.author: Thibault (Thibault)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
The new option “managed template” sounds like a revolution for our Monday uses.
In fact, we create a lot of boards form a template, and now when we want to add a new feature in our boards it is a total nightmare to reupdate all of them.
So we were verrry happy to finally see this new possibility. However, this beta function is available only for Enterprise Plan… Don’t you think that this is an essential element for productivity gains and that this function should be available in a lower Plan, at least for Plan Pro?

posts.author: Martine (Martine Nieuwenhuis)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, I hope other users feel the same.
